posts.raw_content:
Yes, we CAN still win if enough of us will show up at the polls.  If you think our greatest enemies are anti-Christ DEMs and RINOs, they aren't:  Our greatest obstacle and enemy is apathy.  If we stay home just because we are not getting everything we want when we want it and just because our elected officials do not always do what we think they should do, then that is when we become an enemy and obstacle of our own making.

I want to see the SAVE act passed just as much as the rest of you out there, but whether or not it is enacted into law should not be what determines whether or not you vote or how you vote.  Granted that we have our challenges and granted that there remain adversarial figures on both sides of the aisle, but if we do not show up to the polls and show up powerfully like we did in 2024, then we become just as much a part of the problem as the people in office when we need to be the solution every election cycle.

https://x.com/mitchellvii/status/2027144151104380946
